scads 0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Quick Tutorial on scads

    Quick Tutorial on scads

    2026-02-23

    Introduction.Rmd

    Setup

    Confirm PolyFUN and LDSC exist and runs in your conda environment. See their websites for installation and usage guidance.

    # srun --mem-per-cpu=8GB --cpus-per-task=16 --time=8:00:00 --pty /bin/bash
conda activate /dartfs/rc/lab/S/Szhao/liyang/conda/base_clone/
# Rscript -e "rmarkdown::render('/dartfs/rc/lab/S/Szhao/liyang/scads/vignettes/Introduction.Rmd', output_file='/dartfs/rc/lab/S/Szhao/liyang/scads/vignettes/Introduction.html', output_format='html_document')"
R

    Load R packages

    # library(remotes)
# remotes::install_github("szhaolab/scads")
# library(scads)

setwd("/dartfs/rc/lab/S/Szhao/liyang/scads")
devtools::load_all()
#> ℹ Loading scads
#> Loading required package: stats4
#> 
#> Loading required package: BiocGenerics
#> 
#> 
#> Attaching package: 'BiocGenerics'
#> 
#> 
#> The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':
#> 
#>     IQR, mad, sd, var, xtabs
#> 
#> 
#> The following objects are masked from 'package:base':
#> 
#>     anyDuplicated, aperm, append, as.data.frame, basename, cbind,
#>     colnames, dirname, do.call, duplicated, eval, evalq, Filter, Find,
#>     get, grep, grepl, intersect, is.unsorted, lapply, Map, mapply,
#>     match, mget, order, paste, pmax, pmax.int, pmin, pmin.int,
#>     Position, rank, rbind, Reduce, rownames, sapply, setdiff, sort,
#>     table, tapply, union, unique, unsplit, which.max, which.min
#> 
#> 
#> Loading required package: S4Vectors
#> 
#> 
#> Attaching package: 'S4Vectors'
#> 
#> 
#> The following object is masked from 'package:utils':
#> 
#>     findMatches
#> 
#> 
#> The following objects are masked from 'package:base':
#> 
#>     expand.grid, I, unname
#> 
#> 
#> Loading required package: IRanges
#> 
#> Loading required package: GenomeInfoDb
#> 
#> 
#> Attaching package: 'Matrix'
#> 
#> 
#> The following object is masked from 'package:S4Vectors':
#> 
#>     expand
library(scads)

    Load example data

    # Access the dataset
data("demo_count_matrix")

# Examine dataset
dim(demo_count_matrix)
#> [1]  100 1000
demo_count_matrix[1:5,1:5]
#>      chr5:130672416-130672916 chr4:8726737-8727237 chr15:76191731-76192231
#> [1,]                        7                    1                       7
#> [2,]                        3                    2                       1
#> [3,]                       27                    7                       3
#> [4,]                        1                    1                      11
#> [5,]                       13                   20                       4
#>      chr7:26118486-26118986 chr9:115662457-115662957
#> [1,]                      2                        5
#> [2,]                      1                        0
#> [3,]                      7                        8
#> [4,]                      3                        3
#> [5,]                     20                        4

    Prepare a GWAS summary statistics file

    data_file <- system.file("extdata", "SIM_sumstats_chr10.txt.gz", package = "scads")
sumstats <- fread(data_file, header = T)
head(sumstats)
#>      chr    pos        beta         se     a0     a1         snp       pval
#>    <int>  <int>       <num>      <num> <char> <char>      <char>      <num>
#> 1:    10 134706  0.05536500 0.05685897      C      T  rs55896525 0.33019827
#> 2:    10 136067 -0.02858211 0.04524603      C      T rs185642176 0.52758333
#> 3:    10 136104 -0.01931718 0.04723619      C      G rs141504207 0.68257926
#> 4:    10 140366 -0.04360189 0.02560643      C      T  rs10904045 0.08861778
#> 5:    10 141014 -0.03969239 0.02519304      G      A   rs6560828 0.11514118
#> 6:    10 141602  0.02325330 0.02690964      G      C  rs35849539 0.38752373
#>        zscore
#>         <num>
#> 1:  0.9737251
#> 2: -0.6317043
#> 3: -0.4089487
#> 4: -1.7027712
#> 5: -1.5755300
#> 6:  0.8641252

    Run scads

    1. Run fastTopics

    2. Create topic annotations

    3. Run S-LDSC using topic annotations

    • We will run hg19 version of S-LDSC using the recommended baseline_v2.2 model
    1. Calculate Cell Score
    count_matrix = demo_count_matrix
n_topics = 5
n_sims = 1000
n_cores = 16
bl_method = "average" # "gc"
bl_ct = NULL
bl_peaks =NULL
sumstats_d = dirname(data_file)
gwas_n = 764667
trait = "SIM"

myHomeDir <- "/dartfs/rc/lab/S/Szhao/"
# /dartfs/rc/lab/S/Szhao/liyang/SCSviaTM/analysis/

output_dir = paste0(myHomeDir, "liyang/SCSviaTM/analysis/test_260222")
polyfun_d= paste0(myHomeDir, "liyang/polyfun/")
ldsc_d = paste0(myHomeDir, "liyang/ldsc/")
onekg_pref = paste0(myHomeDir, "fine-mapping/LDSCORE/zenodo/1000G_EUR_Phase3_plink/1000G.EUR.QC.")
# onekg_pref = paste0(myHomeDir, "fine-mapping/LDSCORE/zenodo/1000G_EUR_Phase3_plink/1000G.EUR.QC.10.")

baseline_pref = paste0(myHomeDir, "fine-mapping/LDSCORE/zenodo/1000G_Phase3_baselineLD_v2.2_ldscores/baselineLD.")
# baseline_pref = paste0(myHomeDir, "fine-mapping/LDSCORE/zenodo/1000G_Phase3_baselineLD_v2.2_ldscores/baselineLD.10.")

frq_pref = paste0(myHomeDir, "fine-mapping/LDSCORE/zenodo/1000G_Phase3_frq/1000G.EUR.QC.")
# frq_pref = paste0(myHomeDir, "fine-mapping/LDSCORE/zenodo/1000G_Phase3_frq/1000G.EUR.QC.10.")

hm3_file = paste0(myHomeDir, "fine-mapping/LDSCORE/zenodo/hm3_no_MHC.list.txt")
weights_pref = paste0(myHomeDir, "fine-mapping/LDSCORE/zenodo/1000G_Phase3_weights_hm3_no_MHC/weights.hm3_noMHC.")
# weights_pref = paste0(myHomeDir, "fine-mapping/LDSCORE/zenodo/1000G_Phase3_weights_hm3_no_MHC/weights.hm3_noMHC.10.")

cont_topics = FALSE
    set.seed(1234)
scads_res <- scads(
  count_matrix,
  nTopics                 = n_topics,
  n_s                     = n_sims,
  n_c                     = n_cores,
  baseline_method         = bl_method,
  bl_celltype             = bl_ct,
  bl_celltype_peak_file   = bl_peaks,
  sumstats_dir            = sumstats_d,
  gwas_nsamps             = gwas_n,
  gwas_trait              = trait,
  outdir                  = output_dir,
  polyfun_code_dir        = polyfun_d,
  ldsc_code_dir           = ldsc_d,
  onekg_path              = onekg_pref,
  baseline_dir            = baseline_pref,
  frqfile_pref            = frq_pref,
  hm3_snps                = hm3_file,
  weights_pref            = weights_pref,
  continuous_topic_annot  = cont_topics, 
  chrs                    = 10
)
#> 
#> 1. Run FastTopics
#> 
#> Start time: [1] "2026-02-23 10:14:13 EST"
#> 
#> Count matrix dimensions: 100 1000 
#> [1]  100 1000
#> 
#> Removing columns with all zeroes
#> 
#> New dimensions
#>  100 1000
#> Running fastTopics
#> 
#> Start time: [1] "2026-02-23 10:14:13 EST"
#> Initializing factors using Topic SCORE algorithm.
#> Initializing loadings by running 10 SCD updates.
#> Fitting rank-5 Poisson NMF to 100 x 1000 dense matrix.
#> Running 100 EM updates, without extrapolation (fastTopics 0.6-163).
#> Refining model fit.
#> Fitting rank-5 Poisson NMF to 100 x 1000 dense matrix.
#> Running 100 SCD updates, with extrapolation (fastTopics 0.6-163).
#> 
#> Stop time: [1] "2026-02-23 10:14:18 EST"
#> 
#> Determining baseline
#> Baseline:  0.001
#> Running fastTopics-DE
#> 
#> Start time: [1] "2026-02-23 10:14:18 EST"
#> Use f0 provided as single background: 0.001 
#> f0:  1000 5 
#> Fitting 1000 Poisson models with k=5 using method="scd".
#> Using 16 RcppParallel threads.
#>              [,1]         [,2]         [,3]         [,4]         [,5]
#> [1,] 0.0004249928 0.0002831195 0.0003954092 0.0005762337 0.0035293484
#> [2,] 0.0002990648 0.0003355172 0.0031664904 0.0004218041 0.0005183147
#> [3,] 0.0003743291 0.0032196253 0.0004651953 0.0006839339 0.0001130163
#> [4,] 0.0002516220 0.0005145775 0.0034789655 0.0006732259 0.0003156099
#> [5,] 0.0034227807 0.0005927353 0.0002516214 0.0006328403 0.0001981467
#> [6,] 0.0004460212 0.0032782718 0.0003091707 0.0006185047 0.0002718506
#>        V1                  V2                  V3           
#>  Min.   :1.000e-09   Min.   :1.000e-09   Min.   :1.000e-09  
#>  1st Qu.:2.769e-04   1st Qu.:3.107e-04   1st Qu.:3.113e-04  
#>  Median :3.758e-04   Median :4.537e-04   Median :4.125e-04  
#>  Mean   :1.002e-03   Mean   :9.638e-04   Mean   :1.011e-03  
#>  3rd Qu.:5.396e-04   3rd Qu.:6.372e-04   3rd Qu.:6.040e-04  
#>  Max.   :4.002e-03   Max.   :4.112e-03   Max.   :3.780e-03  
#>        V4                  V5           
#>  Min.   :1.000e-09   Min.   :0.0000000  
#>  1st Qu.:3.826e-04   1st Qu.:0.0003145  
#>  Median :4.853e-04   Median :0.0004192  
#>  Mean   :1.008e-03   Mean   :0.0010134  
#>  3rd Qu.:6.467e-04   3rd Qu.:0.0005801  
#>  Max.   :4.318e-03   Max.   :0.0045002  
#> Computing log-fold change statistics from 1000 Poisson models with k=5.
#> [1] "Splitting data"
#> function (dat, L, D, U, M, lfc.stat, conf.level, rw, e)
#>     compute_lfc_stats2(dat$X,dat$F,L,dat$f0,D,U,M,lfc.stat,conf.level,rw,e, #LY
#>                        verbose = FALSE)
#> <environment: 0x564f3de69620>
#>        k1               k2               k3               k4        
#>  Min.   :-4.271   Min.   :-4.495   Min.   :-4.465   Min.   :-3.619  
#>  1st Qu.:-3.003   1st Qu.:-2.613   1st Qu.:-3.021   1st Qu.:-2.351  
#>  Median :-2.676   Median :-2.195   Median :-2.649   Median :-2.013  
#>  Mean   : 3.787   Mean   : 2.627   Mean   : 2.811   Mean   : 2.271  
#>  3rd Qu.:-1.282   3rd Qu.:-1.353   3rd Qu.:-1.345   3rd Qu.:-1.559  
#>  Max.   :48.642   Max.   :45.627   Max.   :55.459   Max.   :53.404  
#>        k5        
#>  Min.   :-4.575  
#>  1st Qu.:-2.802  
#>  Median :-2.514  
#>  Mean   : 2.395  
#>  3rd Qu.:-2.136  
#>  Max.   :49.327  
#>  k1  k2  k3  k4  k5 
#> 218 199 229 175 179 
#> 
#> 2. Get topic annotations
#> 
#> Start time: [1] "2026-02-23 10:14:24 EST"
#> 
#> 3. Run LDSC
#> 
#> Start time: [1] "2026-02-23 10:14:24 EST"
#> 
#> Using 5 cores for 5 tasks.

#> 
#> 4. Calculate cell scores
